title: KrispyRoleplay
description: KrispyRoleplay is an all-in-one plugin for role play servers 🎭 and includes chat and character managment. 👍
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17cf51440f778399e7964e30c27d33dcd76c4691.png)

KrispyRoleplay is an plugin for small to middle sized role play servers and allows players to create up to unlimited role play characters.

Version 2 is in development

11% done so far

KrispyRoleplay v2 is on its way – packed with highly requested features and even more ways to customize your experience. Got ideas for future updates? Join my Discord and share your thoughts

# Features ### 1. Character Management You can create a character for every adventure! No limits. ![](https://i.ibb.co/c2pmXp2/Screenshot-2023-07-21-151627.png) ### 2. Chat Management KrispyRoleplay also manages the ingame chat and you control your characters voice with every message. ![](https://i.ibb.co/W0kmFfJ/Screenshot-2023-07-21-152726.png) ### 3. Chatting out of role play is simple If you add an " * " in front of your message it will be an action and if you put " ) " at the end of your message it will be an out of rp message. ![](https://i.ibb.co/Qmq05Zc/Screenshot-2023-07-21-160331.png) ### 4. Choose every color KrispyRoleplay allows players to use every color in the chat in HEX-Format. ![](https://i.ibb.co/nmWM2qZ/Screenshot-2023-07-21-153640.png) ### 5. ID Cards Every player has an ID Card with information about his character. ![](https://i.ibb.co/MPBKRfy/Screenshot-2023-07-25-150820.png) ### 6. See your friend's ID Card without using any command You can use /id see , but if you want to see the ID Card faster, just do shift + right-click on your target and you will get the ID Card without the use of any command. ![](https://i.ibb.co/JvvFgDx/Screenshot-2023-10-28-230744.png) ### 7. (optional) Change your skin with your character When you install KrispyRoleplay with [SkinsRestorer](https://hangar.papermc.io/SRTeam/SkinsRestorer) you will automatically change your skin to the skin that you have set in the creation process of your character. # Ideas or bugs? #### You can contact me on [Discord](https://discord.gg/Vhhcu9x)
